description: Address code review findings: short-circuit stale polling in settings, replace timer-based drag guard with try/finally, add per-widget empty messages on dashboard, and coalesce expiresAt to 0 in route.ts.
steps: Step 1 - Short-circuit stale polling in settings (frontend/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx): In the else-if branch that detects a service was already connected before the connect action, add clearInterval(intervalId), setConnectingService(null), and oauthPopupRef.current = null to immediately stop polling and reset state.

Step 2 - Replace timer-based drag guard with try/finally (frontend/app/dashboard/tasks/page.tsx): Remove the setTimeout(..., 100) that resets dragProcessingRef and instead wrap the handler logic in a try/finally block that resets dragProcessingRef.current = false synchronously.

Step 3 - Add per-widget empty messages on dashboard (frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx): When accessToken is empty, show contextual messages in the Timeline and Upcoming Tasks empty states like 'Connect your Google account to see data here' instead of generic empty messages.

Step 4 - Coalesce expiresAt to 0 (frontend/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts): Change token.expiresAt = account.expires_at to token.expiresAt = account.expires_at ?? 0 for consistency with the other coalesced fields.
acceptance_criteria: The else-if branch in settings polling useEffect calls clearInterval and resets state immediately
dragProcessingRef uses a synchronous try/finally reset instead of setTimeout
Dashboard widgets show a connect-your-account message when accessToken is empty
token.expiresAt is coalesced to 0 when account.expires_at is undefined/null
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/Haven/frontend && pnpm lint` - should pass with no errors
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/Haven/frontend && pnpm test` - should pass (2 pre-existing failures expected)
findings: All four review issues addressed. Pre-existing test failures in ChatExperience and Sidebar remain (not caused by our changes). Lint passes cleanly.
